-- n8n
DO $$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'n8n') THEN
        CREATE ROLE n8n WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'mHUL8RJzm64pUXTwcRP19xJdVXWAtzE7';
    ELSE
        ALTER ROLE n8n WITH PASSWORD 'mHUL8RJzm64pUXTwcRP19xJdVXWAtzE7';
    END IF;
END
$$;
SELECT 'CREATE DATABASE n8n_db OWNER n8n' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'n8n_db') \gexec

-- NocoDB
DO $$
BEGIN
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'nocodb') THEN
        CREATE ROLE nocodb WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'NWAJtMSnSD5ZYuwigQDkZyER0v2QwJY9';
    ELSE
        ALTER ROLE nocodb WITH PASSWORD 'NWAJtMSnSD5ZYuwigQDkZyER0v2QwJY9';
    END IF;
END
$$;
SELECT 'CREATE DATABASE nocodb_db OWNER nocodb' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'nocodb_db') \gexec
